name: High-purity spermidine was short-term tolerable but minimally changed circulating polyamines
summary: A short exploratory trial supports tolerability while limiting claims about pathway engagement.
statement: A short double-blind randomized trial in 37 healthy older men found no study-product-related adverse events, but also did not observe substantial serum or urine polyamine changes after high-purity spermidine supplementation.
caveats: The study was short and exploratory.
The finding supports safety more than efficacy or durable pathway modulation.
The sponsor funded the trial and some authors were sponsor employees or funded by the sponsor.
